message:
feat(firecracker): add SetDrive API method

Adds SetDrive method to APIClient for configuring block devices via
the Firecracker API. The method sends a PUT request to /drives/{driveID}
with drive configuration including path, root device flag, and read-only flag.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
